backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex ICP/ckUSDT grid trading bot with configurable interval, spread, and order count, using recurring timers to place buy/sell grid orders around the mid-price fetched from the ICDex canister.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON with no features listed, used for build/validation tracking.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as documentation for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, card, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting to a root div and loading the Vite/TypeScript main module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the full dashboard layout with a sticky header, footer, and a grid of BotControlPanel, ConfigurationPanel, MarketDataPanel, and GridPreviewTable components.
React component displaying bot running/stopped status with animated indicator and Start/Stop buttons that call the respective backend mutations with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: React form component for editing and saving bot configuration (intervalSeconds, spreadBps, numOrders) with client-side validation, loading state, and success feedback.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays a sorted table of the bot's current grid orders (buys and sells) fetched via `useLastGrid`, with loading skeletons, order count badges, and a manual refresh button.
Shows the latest mid price for the ICP/ckUSDT pair fetched via `useLastMidPrice`, with loading state, pair/exchange info, and a refresh button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and expose the user's identity via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for reading bot status, config, mid price, and grid data (polled every 10 s), plus mutations for starting/stopping the bot and updating config.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports JetBrains Mono, sets up a terminal-dark OKLCH color theme with Tailwind CSS variables for both light and dark modes, and defines custom utility classes for buy/sell colors and terminal borders.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the trading terminal frontend, defining a dark terminal-inspired theme with oklch color variables, custom fonts (JetBrains Mono, Inter), trading-specific colors (buy/sell/running/stopped), and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing the ICP/ckUSDT trading bot (Motoko canister), its architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and planned work including smart grid repositioning and dynamic order quantities.
